frontend: Gorgias Chat (AI-powered) — WebSocket; conversation rendered in same-origin chat-window iframe
metric: send -> reply text rendered in chat-window iframe (textContent growth + stability)
note: NouriVida is Gorgias's own demo storefront, so this reflects a best-case, sales-tuned configuration. The agent consistently renders product cards, recommends specific SKUs with links, and offers discount codes — even appending upsells to policy answers.

results.a: Yes. Shipping is free on orders over $100 in North America ($9.99 under $100). International: free over $200, $19.99 under. (answered; first turn, not cleanly timed)

results.q: I have low energy in the afternoon. Which product do you recommend?
results.a: Rendered a product card (Complete Meal Powder – Matcha $6.99) + 'For an afternoon boost, go with Complete Meal Powder – Matcha… clean, steady fuel.' with product link and an 8% off code.
We accept returns — just let us know. (Then upsold: 'Complete Meal Powder – Matcha is still a strong pick. Ready to grab it with your 8% code?')

results.q: Are your products vegan and gluten-free?
results.a: Most of our range is plant-based, so vegan options are available. No gluten-free confirmation for every product. (Rendered cards: Berry Boost, Complete Daily Essentials.)

results.q: What do you recommend to help me sleep better?
results.a: If you want something more calming in the evening, Golden Milk – Turmeric Glow looks like the best fit [link]. Also suggested the Functional Cartons collection.
Orders usually arrive in 5–7 business days within North America; international 14–21 business days.

features: Renders product cards with price, recommends specific SKUs with links, applies discount codes, offers add-to-cart/checkout nudges, and provides quick-reply chips.
